description: Strong match: Python backend developer applying for FastAPI role
cv_text:
Alex Johnson
alexj@email.com

EXPERIENCE

Backend Engineer — TechCorp (2022–2025)
- Built and deployed REST APIs using FastAPI and Python, serving 50k requests/day
- Designed PostgreSQL schemas and wrote optimised queries reducing latency by 35%
- Containerised services with Docker and managed deployments via GitHub Actions CI/CD
- Integrated OpenAI API to build an internal document summarisation tool
- Wrote pytest test suites achieving 90% code coverage

Junior Developer — StartupXYZ (2021–2022)
- Developed Python scripts for data processing pipelines using pandas
- Built internal Flask APIs for reporting dashboards

SKILLS
Python, FastAPI, Flask, PostgreSQL, Docker, GitHub Actions, pytest, REST APIs, OpenAI API, Git

EDUCATION
BSc Computer Science — University of Manchester, 2021
job_description:
Backend Engineer — Python/FastAPI

We are looking for a backend engineer to join our platform team.

Responsibilities:
- Design and build RESTful APIs using FastAPI
- Work with PostgreSQL databases
- Containerise services with Docker
- Write automated tests with pytest
- Collaborate with frontend teams on API contracts

Requirements:
- 2+ years Python experience
- FastAPI or Django REST Framework
- PostgreSQL or MySQL
- Docker and CI/CD pipelines
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP or Azure)

Nice to have:
- OpenAI or LLM integration experience
- Kubernetes
ground_truth: This CV is a strong match for the Python/FastAPI Backend Engineer role. The candidate has direct experience with FastAPI, Python, PostgreSQL, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines. Strengths include production API deployment at scale, database optimisation, and containerisation. The primary gap is lack of cloud platform experience. Missing keywords: AWS, GCP, Azure, Kubernetes. Role alignment is Strong.

description: Weak match: Frontend developer applying for backend Python role
